===================
===================
=== bd1986-07-22-mansfield.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 7/22/86, Great Woods Performing Arts Center, Mansfield, Massachusetts, 4CDR

Same recording as LB-1606 (46min+45min+44min+45min), very good sound; upfront talking on d1t8, d1t9, d2t1, d3t5; background talkng on d2t4; there are pauses between cdrs as if they were cassette flips

light mic noie static d3t8 0:03

lineage: uncertain (most likely derived from LB-1606); more or less like this: LB-1606 > ? > Cd-R's > wav (eac burst mode) > flac > flac (Jeffy's HD) > flac (baggy's HD) > flac (Jantemp) > me > you (presumably same flacs Jeffy received)

Disc One, Bob Dylan and the band, 1 Shake A Hand, 2 All Along The Watchtower, 3 Clean-Cut Kid, 4 Emotionally Yours, 5 Shot Of Love, 6 We Had It All, 7 Masters Of War, Tom Petty and the Heartbreakers, 8 Listen To Her Heart, 9 Think About Me, 10 The Waiting, 

Disc Two, 1 Breakdown, Bob Dylan solo, 2 The Times They Are A-Changin', 3 Girl Of The North Country, 4 A Hard Rain's A-Gonna Fall, Bob Dylan with Tom Petty backed by the band, 5 I Forgot More Than You'll Ever Know, 6 Union Sundown, 7 When The Night Comes Falling From The Sky, 8 Lonesome Town, 

Disc Three, 1 Ballad Of A Thin Man, Tom Petty and the Heartbreakers, 2 The Loser, 3/4 Spike, 5 Tonight Might Be My Night, 6 Refugee, Bob Dylan and the band, 7 Rainy Day Women Nos. 12 & 35, 8 Seeing The Real You At Last, 9 Across The Borderline, 

Disc Four, 1 I And I, 2 Like A Rolling Stone, 3 In The Garden, (encore), Dylan/Petty duet, 4 Blowin' In The Wind, Bob Dylan and the band, 5 Uranium Rock, 6 Knockin' On Heaven's Door
===================
===================
===================
